title: Ethereal Craft
description: Ethereal Craft overhauls the overworld, enhances the Nether and End, and introduces outer space exploration for a transformative Minecraft adventure.
body:
# Ethereal Craft

Ethereal Craft is a transformative modpack that amplifies Vanilla Minecraft through an extensive collection of over a hundred mods. It redefines exploration and combat, introducing new realms and challenges.

## Features
- **Outer Space Exploration**: Venture into the cosmos with Ad Astra, adding a new dimension of exploration.
- **Revitalized Villages**: Experience Overhauled Village for more dynamic and interactive village life.
- **Enhanced Nether**: Delve into a more perilous and rewarding Nether.
- **Expanded End**: Discover a richer End dimension with new landscapes and mysteries.
- **New Enemies and Allies**: Face off against formidable foes and encounter unique creatures in Bosses of Mass Destruction.
- **Bountiful Bounties**: Engage in Bountiful for dynamic questing and rewards.
- **World Generation Refined**: Terralith, Traverse, and Promenade bring life to the world with enhanced biomes and terrains.
- **Integrated Shaders**: Enjoy beautiful visuals with Complementary Unbound shaders built into the game.

## Q&A

> Q: Why did you create this modpack?

A: I want to play Better MC multiplayer but without setting up a dedicated server, and I also added the space mod (Ad Astra) because I think it's fun to play.

> Q: Are there any ads in this modpack?

A: No, but technically, yes, but the ads come from the mods and not this modpack.
